info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yadASrOzaM devarAjena dattAM divyAM SaktiM vyaMsitAM mADavena' (BA0 Adi0 1199) vyaMsitAM vyarTIkftAm iti nIla0
